messages.content:
Discuss potential security controls to mitigate this vulnerability.

Jenkins Debian Package Builder Plugin 1.6.11 and earlier implements functionality that allows agents to invoke command-line `git` at an attacker-specified path on the controller, allowing attackers able to control agent processes to invoke arbitrary OS commands on the controller.

To mitigate this vulnerability, apply least privilege principles for agent permissions, ensure input validation and sanitization, and update the Jenkins Debian Package Builder Plugin to a version that addresses this issue.
